name: Paid Discord Command Agent
description: Turns Discord slash commands into paid, receipt-gated agent actions using the self-hosted Discord launcher.
degenPitch: Slash command in, receipt checked, paid answer out.
whatItDoes: Quotes a paid Discord slash command.
Verifies receipt before returning premium command output.
Runs self-hosted with local Discord token only.
feeBehavior: Each paid command shows the fee waterfall and verifies receipt before unlock.
cursorPrompt: Build a Paid Discord Command Agent using DNA x402. Use launchers/discord, quote slash command output, verify receipt, unlock the result, and keep the Discord token local.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Paid Discord Command Agent using DNA x402. Use launchers/discord, quote slash command output, verify receipt, unlock the result, and keep the Discord token local.
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt ID is returned with the response.
Paid retry avoids duplicate command charge.
